A '''subspecies''' of [[Nerf/Legends|nerf]]—a [[Sentience/Legends|nonsentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]—lived on<ref name="Alien" /> the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Grizmallt/Legends|Grizmallt]]. The subspecies featured a variety of differences to common nerfs, having more resemblance to [[Eopie/Legends|eopies]] with antlers. It was speculated in [[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species (book)|''The New Essential Guide to Alien Species'']], an [[Sentientologist|anthropological]] text compiled from the notes of [[Senior Anthropologist]] [[Mammon Hoole]], that the nerfs on Grizmallt had evolved in body shape and neck length through thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of reaching up to [[Tree/Legends|trees]] to [[Diet/Legends|eat]] [[Berry/Legends|berries]] and leaves.<ref name="Alien" />

==Behind the scenes==
The nerf subspecies from Grizmallt was mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'', a [[2006]] reference book by [[Ann Margaret Lewis (real person)|Ann Margaret Lewis]].<ref name="Alien" />
